emails.subject: DWR - Gas Daily
emails.body: DWR Gas Daily Jeff, Gas Daily has an article on DWR activities for purchasing gas.... do you know Pete Garris and is he the guy we want to get together with... or is Balwin's co. going to carry the ball. I remain unclear as to who actually is doing the gas buying.. Further to our conversation of last week... let's meet with these guys soonest. BT

emails.subject: DWR - Gas Daily
emails.body: DWR Gas Daily Jeff, Gas Daily has an article on DWR activities for purchasing gas.... do you know Pete Garris and is he the guy we want to get together with... or is Balwin's co. going to carry the ball. I remain unclear as to who actually is doing the gas buying.. Further to our conversation of last week... let's meet with these guys soonest. BT

emails.subject: RE: DWR - Gas Daily
emails.body: RE: DWR Gas Daily It's Baldwin. Let me know what dates you want to meet and I'll set it up. Best, Jeff

emails.subject: RE: DWR - Gas Daily
emails.body: RE: DWR Gas Daily It's Baldwin. Let me know what dates you want to meet and I'll set it up. Best, Jeff

emails.subject: RE: DWR - Gas Daily
emails.body: you are up early.... This Friday, Monday a.m. or Tues will be fine. Mark is in San Fransisco... who were we going to see in Sacremento. BT [Tycholiz, Barry]

emails.subject: RE: DWR - Gas Daily
emails.body: you are up early.... This Friday, Monday a.m. or Tues will be fine. Mark is in San Fransisco... who were we going to see in Sacremento. BT [Tycholiz, Barry]

emails.subject: RE: DWR - Gas Daily
emails.body: I'll set it up. This Firday is not good. I'll shoot for Monday or Tuesday. DWR's in Sacramento. Mark is 50 miles east of SF in Livermore. Best, Jeff

emails.subject: RE: DWR - Gas Daily
emails.body: RE: DWR Gas Daily Could you forward the gas daily article? Thanks. Jeff To: Dasovich, Jeff
